title: Concept Couple Summer Festival 2x2 Grid Real
sourceTitle: Concept Couple Summer Festival 2x2 Grid Real
prompt:
{
  "concept": "couple_summer_festival_2x2_grid_real_camera_flash",
  "format": "2x2 photo grid collage, four equal panels arranged in a square, thin black gutters between panels, each panel a separate candid photograph of the same couple at the same outdoor night music festival, taken seconds to minutes apart on real cameras",
  "style": "looks like a real disposable camera roll someone got developed and posted to Instagram, not staged, not retouched, accidentally framed moments, mix of point-and-shoot flash and phone-camera shots",
  "camera_signatures": {
    "panel_1_camera": "cheap point-and-shoot digital camera with built-in flash, fixed 35mm equivalent lens, small 1/2.3 inch sensor, harsh direct flash producing flat frontal light with hot spots on closest skin, slight barrel distortion at edges, weak low-light performance creating chunky color noise in shadows, JPEG compression artifacts visible in dark gradients, slightly soft focus typical of consumer compact cameras",
    "panel_2_camera": "disposable film camera or single-use Kodak FunSaver, 27mm fixed plastic lens, ISO 800 film stock, built-in flash with classic film flash falloff, mild vignetting at corners, real silver halide film grain not digital noise, slight green-magenta color shifts in shadows from one-hour-photo processing, light leak possible on one edge, slightly soft plastic-lens focus character",
    "panel_3_camera": "modern smartphone front camera in low light, slight wide-angle distortion at edges of face, computational HDR fighting with the fireworks creating crushed shadows and slightly halo'd highlights around bright bursts, smartphone-typical sharpening on faces, low-light grain from high ISO, slight chromatic noise in dark areas",
    "panel_4_camera": "same point-and-shoot as panel 1, same harsh flash signature, slight motion blur from camera shake because the photographer is also in the crowd and got jostled"
  },
  "couple_identity_lock": {
    "consistency_rule": "the exact same two people in all four panels, identical faces, identical hair, identical jewelry, identical outfits, only their expressions and micro-poses change between panels",
    "female": {
      "features": "young woman late twenties, naturally pretty not retouched, asymmetric features that read as real, slight under-eye shadow from a long festival day, a small freckle on the left cheek as identity anchor, a tiny faded acne mark near the jaw, one front tooth very slightly overlapping the other when smiling wide, eyebrows naturally uneven, real pore texture visible especially on the nose and forehead, slight forehead shine from sweat",
      "hair": "long dark brown wavy hair, day-three festival texture, slightly oily at the roots, a little frizz around the hairline from humidity, ends a touch dry, middle part not perfectly straight, a few strands sticking to her neck from sweat",
      "makeup": "started as soft festival glam in the morning, now lived-in, mascara slightly smudged under one eye, lip gloss mostly worn off leaving a stained nude-pink tint, blush still present on cheeks blended with natural flush, highlighter mostly absorbed leaving real skin glow",
      "wardrobe": "fitted white satin slip mini dress with thin spaghetti straps, body-skimming bias cut, a small mascara smudge or smudge of something near the chest, slightly wrinkled at the waist from a long day, one strap occasionally slipping at the shoulder",
      "accessories": "delicate gold layered necklaces resting at collarbone with one chain slightly twisted, small gold hoop earrings, thin stacked gold rings, paper festival wristband on left wrist slightly frayed at the edges from a few days of wear"
    },
    "male": {
      "features": "young man late twenties, ordinary handsome not model-perfect, slight asymmetry in the jaw, light stubble that has grown a day past clean-shaven, a small mole somewhere on the neck or face as identity anchor, real skin texture with visible pores on the nose, slight oil on the T-zone from heat, tired-happy eyes",
      "hair": "messy medium-length dark brown hair, slightly damp at the roots from sweat, natural texture not styled with product, falling slightly forward over the forehead",
      "wardrobe": "plain white cotton t-shirt now slightly translucent from sweat at the lower back and underarms, real weave visible, a small stain or wrinkle at the hem, paired with dark indigo straight-cut jeans creased at the knees from sitting and standing all day",
      "accessories": "simple thin silver chain necklace just visible at the neckline, single silver ring, matching paper festival wristband on right wrist"
    },
    "chemistry": "real tired-happy couple energy at the end of a long festival day, the kind of comfortable closeness where one is leaning on the other without thinking about it, no performance for the camera, genuine smiles, lived-in love"
  },
  "environment_shared": {
    "setting": "large outdoor summer music festival at night, open sky above, crowded but warm not aggressive, the kind of festival where the crowd is mostly twenty-somethings",
    "background_elements": "blurred massive festival stage in deep distance with purple, violet, and lilac beam lights cutting through dark sky, crowd silhouettes with phone lights raised, atmospheric haze and smoke catching the stage beams, occasional warm spark or pyro point, real festival messiness visible if you look closely",
    "time": "late evening past sundown into full night, summer warm air with slight humidity"
  },
  "panels": {
    "panel_1_top_left_kiss_in_crowd": {
      "moment": "side-profile kiss in the middle of the festival crowd, caught candidly by a friend with a point-and-shoot",
      "pose": "side-profile kiss, his hand cradling the back of her head into her hair, her hand resting on his chest, both eyes closed, foreheads pressed together, slight smile still visible on her lips, a single strand of her hair caught between their faces",
      "background": "purple and violet stage beam lights cutting through the night behind their silhouettes, crowd silhouettes blurred close around them with phone screen glows scattered, a stranger's elbow visible in the foreground edge of frame because the photographer was packed into the crowd, haze",
      "lighting": "direct on-camera flash from the photographer's position lighting both faces with the characteristic harsh frontal flatness of a cheap point-and-shoot, slight hot spot on his cheek which is closest to the flash, hard short shadow behind them on the crowd, purple stage glow as cool rim light on hair edges and shoulders",
      "framing": "slightly off-center composition, the photographer was not aiming carefully, the kiss is in the right two-thirds of the frame with empty crowd on the left",
      "mood": "intimate, real, in their own world inside the loud crowd"
    },
    "panel_2_top_right_bouquet_cheek_kiss": {
      "moment": "playful candid against a dark stone festival wall, he kisses her cheek while she laughs holding a bouquet, shot on a disposable film camera",
      "pose": "she stands slightly in front, head tilted with a big genuine laugh and squinted-happy eyes showing the slightly overlapping front tooth, holding a mid-sized bouquet at chest level, he stands behind-side with one arm wrapped around her waist, his lips pressed to her cheek with closed eyes and soft smile, his nose slightly smushing into her cheek from the angle",
      "bouquet": "mid-sized casual bouquet of soft pink roses, a few orange-pink gerbera daisies, white spray roses, small white baby's breath, and bright yellow wildflowers, wrapped in simple kraft paper with a thin twine tie, slightly wilted at the edges from being held all evening, held a little crookedly in both her hands",
      "background": "dark moody stone or brick festival wall behind them, warm string lights or amber wall sconce in soft bokeh on one side, a tiny bit of graffiti or a stuck festival flyer visible on the wall",
      "lighting": "classic disposable camera flash from front, slightly overexposed highlights on her cheek, his hand, and the brightest bouquet flowers, dark wall absorbing background into deep shadow with mild green-magenta film cast in the shadow areas",
      "playful_overlay": "a small cute white cartoon heart sticker digitally added above their heads, slightly tilted, simple thin outline style as if added in a photo-edit app later",
      "film_character": "real silver halide grain visible across the whole frame, mild vignetting at corners, slight color shift in the shadows from one-hour-photo processing, a faint orange light leak on the right edge of the frame",
      "mood": "playful, sweet, giddy, end-of-day happy"
    },
    "panel_3_bottom_left_fireworks_selfie": {
      "moment": "close selfie with fireworks exploding behind them, taken on her phone",
      "pose": "she holds the phone for a selfie at slight downward angle, arms wrapped around his neck pulling him close, bright camera-ready smile to the lens with eyes squinted-happy, he is pressed against her side with closed eyes kissing her cheek with soft smile, her arm visibly extending out of frame at the bottom corner because of the selfie angle",
      "background": "large warm red, gold, and amber firework bursts exploding in the dark night sky behind them, smaller spark trails falling, blurred crowd below with phone lights scattered",
      "lighting": "warm red-gold firework glow washing across the right side of their faces and hair, cool ambient night blue on the opposite side, no flash because phone front cameras struggle with flash at night, the fireworks are the only real light source",
      "phone_camera_character": "slight wide-angle distortion stretching the edges of her face near the frame corners, computational HDR creating slightly crushed shadows around their hair and slightly halo'd highlights around the fireworks, smartphone sharpening visible on their faces, low-light digit
